name: Nekros Prime
description: Death's new master. Featuring altered mod polarities allow for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Restore |HEALTH| Health with every enemy death within |RADIUS|m.

abilities.name: Soul Punch
abilities.description: A blow so powerful, it turns the enemy's very soul into a deadly projectile, damaging all in its path. Enemies that survive the blow are Marked for Harvest and become one of Nekros' Shadows of the Dead if killed while marked.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.description: Cast fear into the hearts of nearby enemies, causing them to run away in terror.

abilities.name: Desecrate
abilities.description: Forces fallen enemies around you to drop additional loot.

abilities.name: Shadows Of The Dead
abilities.description: Summon shadow versions of vanquished enemies to fight alongside you for a short period.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Death's new master. Featuring altered mod polarities allow for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Nekros Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Nekros Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Nekros Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Terrify 100% Armor Reduction not working on Eximus in Elite Sanctuary Onslaught.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nekros’ Lua Thrax Shadows of the Dead applying their Life Support drain in Conjunction Survival missions.
patchlogs.fixes: Nekros’ Lua Thrax Shadows of the Dead only attacking other Lua Thrax enemies.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Nekros’ Terrify.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Was: Use on a downed ally to revive them with 30% of health. Nekros’s energy will be consumed. 
Now: Core Augment function unchanged, but no longer requires all of Nekros’ Energy to be consumed on cast. It now costs the same as base Soul Punch (25 Energy) to cast.  
Increase Nekros' Terrify armor reduction from 20% to 60%.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Hydroid's Pilfering Swarm, Nekros Desecrate, and Khora's Pilfering Strangledome affecting Vitoplast drop amounts from enemies in Void Flood missions.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Desecrate and Hydroid’s Pilfering Swarm being able to duplicate Voidplume Pinion and Arcane drops from Void Manifestation fights.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed clones spawned by Shadows of the Dead not teleporting back to Nekros when they are too far.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed several Nekros Helmets having silver parts that could not be colored otherwise.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows having the finisher UI and health bars if revived after using a finisher move.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: Hemocyte is now immune to looting abilities that often didn’t fully work due to how quickly the body despawns (Hydroid's Tentacle Swarm with Pilfering Swarm, Nekros' Desecrate etc).

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead clones counting as enemies killed in the Mastery Rank 30 test.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Soul Punch no longer creating a Shadow of the Dead after 7 Shadows if you replace his Shadows of the Dead ability via Helminth.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that could occur when abruptly leaving a mission with Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead active.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nekros resurrecting Gox enemies when using Shadows of the Dead.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.7
patchlogs.changes: Reduced Nekros Soul Punch area-of-effect physics impulse so it no longer launches enemies across the solar system.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Nekros’ Soul Punch to ‘mark’ a victim and then killing them with a weapon not raising them as a Shadow for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nekros Soulpunching an enemy to raise them as Shadow not respecting modified Shield of Shadows power strength if that enemy is your first Shadow.
Fixed Nekros Soulpunching a victim to death not raising the victim as a Shadow for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
*Nekros’ Soul Punch now has a new mechanic: Marked for Harvest. Enemies that are hit by Soul Punch but don’t die have a Duration wherein they’ll be eligible to become a Shadow if killed while Marked!
Nekros’ Soul Punch now has a new mechanic: Marked for Harvest. Enemies that are hit by Soul Punch but don’t die have a Duration wherein they’ll be eligible to become a Shadow if killed while Marked!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some intersections and awkward bowstring positions with Nekros’ animation idles.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Nekros’ Shadows Of The Dead ability.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 27.5.6 + 27.5.6.1
patchlogs.changes: *Reminder that the Prime Gene Masking Kit will be available in both the Trinity Prime Pack AND the Trinity Prime Accessories Pack: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1195208-trinity-prime-vault-accessories-pack-clarification/Oberon Prime and Nekros Prime, as well as their signature Prime Weapons, Accessories, have reentered the Prime Vault and have been removed from the drop tables.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead ability appearing wrong when Deferred Rendering is enabled.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed a dozen unnecessary scripts from Nekros’ cloth.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Nekros: 65 to 100
Nekros Prime: 65 to 125
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ally Grineer Napalms (Nekros’ Shadow of the Dead) damaging themselves with their own missiles.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Prime Vault 27.1.2
patchlogs.changes: As foretold last week, the Ducat selling price of Oberon Prime Systems and Nekros Prime Blueprint have been changed to 65 from 100.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Restored the original default Energy colors of the Limbo Limina Skin and Nekros Irkalla Skin to match its original artist intentions.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead spawning enemy ships inside Railjacks (lol).

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script crash that could occur from Nekros’ Desecrate ability.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Nekros’ Desecrate ability.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Loot corpse: Nekros, Chesa

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed friendly Mine Osprey Drones from Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead causing a progression stopper in Gas City ‘kill all remaining enemies’ missions due to the Drone not timing out, and not taking allied damage. This also fixes the same progression stopper in Gas City Defense missions due to an inability to end the Wave.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of Amalgam Machinists creating Ospreys that are friendly and break progression in Gas City Defense missions. The Ospreys spawned by Machinist Shadows will now be tracked properly as Shadows.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Energy color persisting as default on the Nekros Irkalla Skin.
Fixed Nekros’ Charon Helmet Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Soul Punch not counting towards Challenges that count Revives.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nekros’ Desecrate removing the Exploiter Orbs body, resulting in missing death explosion.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Chesa Kubrow now attempts to retrieve the single closest loot, the same way Nekros’ Desecrate does.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.15
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ratels spawned from a Corpus Sniper shadow (Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead) not appearing purple or having a Health decay, thus resulting in an inability to progress through certain missions (Defense waves, etc).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3 + 24.1.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix to Howl and Nekros’ Terrify sometimes not making the target run away in the Plains or Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nekros's Irkalla Binds not being attached when in Archwing mode.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.1 + 24.1.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Desecrate duplicating Orb Vallis Base Capture Datamasses.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.changes: Loki Lupu Helmet by LuboxNekros Charon Helmet by malayu and Scharkie

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Icarius Syandana offsets that got a bit wonky on Mag, Banshee, Nekros, Saryn, and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved Nekros’ Shadow of the Dead FX to better support replicating larger AI.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadow of the Dead Infested Brood Mothers producing looping/stacking maggot sound effects.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.changes:
Nekros Graxx Skin by Faven
Nekros Ion Helmet by Yatus

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros Prime having a ‘None’ Skin option.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.8 + 22.20.8.1
patchlogs.changes: For consistency, damage link abilities (Trinity, Nidus, Nekros) will no longer transmit self-damage, but you will still get the damage reduction. This is particularly relevant for the healer/support class of Trinity who had become the go-to DPS frame in addition to the intended support roles. The re-release of Mods like Aviator added to some clever but ultimately uncharacteristic roles for Trinity.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros being able to Desecrate already desecrated bodies or invincible bodies.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Zephyr Prime 22.16.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Soul Punch projectile not affecting nearby enemies.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead clones not attacking enemies.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.1
patchlogs.fixes: There are some other known issues we are working on, including Nekros' Shadows of the Dead not functioning properly as well as Vor’s Prize.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.changes: Updated the look of Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead minions to help players better differentiate between them and real enemies.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Ivara’s Prowl will now only steal from each enemy once total, instead of once per Ivara. Our intent is to mirror how Nekros’ Desecrate also functions, considering the recent movement of Sentient Cores to certain Sentient variants. It’s rewarding to be the warmly welcomed Nekros in an Argon Crystal run, and we hope Ivara will now be welcomed equivalently.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed blue undertone from Nekros Irkalla’s energy wisps.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros Irkalla showing incorrect FX.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nekros Deluxe's auxiliary and attachments not working as intended.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Armor Attachments not showing up on the Nekros Irkalla skin.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Improved the cloth physics on Nekros’ Irkalla Binds.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Irkalla Binds appearing regardless of having them equipped on Nekros and Nekros Prime.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nekros’ Irkalla chains clipping through his body.
Fixed Nekros’ Irkalla wrist chains floating away.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros Prime arm dangle details appearing when equipped on the Nekros Irkalla Skin. As is standard and precedent for all in-house Deluxe Skins, the override of Prime Details is the intent.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.additions: Defy death itself, and crush the living with new Deluxe skins for Nekros and Ember! Return from the underworld to haunt your enemies with the Nekros Irkalla Deluxe Skin, and burn your foes to a crisp with Ember Vermillion Deluxe Skin! Each Warframe Deluxe Skin is also available as a collection with signature weapon skins and accessories.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed supply drop missions in the Plains not progressing if you resurrected the enemy that held the beacon using Nekros' Shadow Of The Dead.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the first shadow from Nekros Shadows of the Dead being spawned far away and potentially out of bounds.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Toned down lens flair on Nekros' idle.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.4
patchlogs.changes: The Neo N7 Relic has been introduced into the mix to fix Nekros Prime Systems Blueprint being accidentally vaulted, and the Meso S6 Relic has also been introduced to fix Spira Prime Blade being accidentally vaulted.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested Boiler Nekros shadows spawning pods when they die (they are only supposed to spawn them on damage).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Oberon’s Renewal now heals friendly summoned units (IE Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead) at 1/3 the rate but consumes 1/3 the Energy drain for doing so. The change to have Renewal not affect friendly summons was met with varying opinions, and is now further tweaked to meet a happy middle ground.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead can now summon Eximus units! This fixes the issue of Nekros being unable to summon Eximus units at all.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 20.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Scavenger Ospreys summoned by Nekros/manipulated by Nyx/other abilities consuming loot (they ignore it now when ‘under the influence’).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Nekros' Terrify range and duration increased in Conclave.
Nekros’ passive is now 6 seconds of +5 Heal On Kill in Conclave (disabled on Health damage).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Nekros’ Noble Animation would play the Dual Pistol idle variant while holding a Rifle.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.6+19.5.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros and Frost Idle sounds when using their animation sets with other Warframes.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed all Comba/Scrambus’ being able to nullify Nekros’ Shadow of the Dead summons.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nekros’ Hyekka Master clones damaging allies with her fire grenade as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/714188-nekross-shadow-hyekka-master-burns-other-shadows/
Fixed a Law of Retribution progression stopper due to Nekros spawning a Grineer holding a Tritium Bomb as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/698100-nekros-shadows-of-the-dead-can-spawn-with-tritium-bomb-for-last-part-of-law-of-retribution-raid/

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nekros not being able to Desecrate dead enemies that are playing a death animation.
Fixed Nekros desecrating one piece of a corpse causing the Desecrate timer to be reset for other pieces of the same corpse.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the holster position of secondary weapons on Nekros & Chroma.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Update 1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that occurred while using Nekros’ Desecrate.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.changes: Nekros Prime parts added to the Warframe Nexus App.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes:
The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!):
Get Nekros Prime Access now and make the newest Primes yours 
including Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, Galatine Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!
The new Relics added that contain Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, and Galatine Prime now contain a mix of the unvaulted items from the above removed Relics.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Increased cost of Nekros’ Desecrate in Conclave
Reduced duration, range and added a debuff icon on target of Nekros’ Desecrate debuff in Conclave
Removed Energy drop from Nekros’ Desecrate in Conclave
Decreased Nekros’ Desecrate delay slightly to make it more popcorny.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Duration Mods reducing energy per enemy for Nekros’ Desecrate. Power Efficiency should only affect energy per enemy for Desecrate.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.2
patchlogs.changes: Changed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead teleport range to greater than 30 meters from Nekros. To clarify function here, if a Shadow is 30 meters away from you on recast, it will teleport to range. If it is less than 30 meters away, it will heal.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.changes: The number of Shadows spawned has been reduced to 7 and is no longer affected by Mods. This is a necessary change for performance on all platforms. To compensate for this, Nekros now spawns stronger Shadows prioritized by heavy unites killed with Shield multiplier and draw aggro more heavily.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Desecrate pickups not being shot upwards for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case where Nekros’ Soul Punch caused some performance issues.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Added intended tendrils to Nekros’ Lazarus helmet.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes:
A helmet for the Nekros Warframe, designed by [k a z].
Fixed the holster position of the Staticor and thrown sidearms for Nekros and Limbo.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the range and damage of Nekros’ Soul Punch in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Nekros Soul Punch Conclave Augment 
Nekros’ Terrify will no longer fear boss-type enemies, but will continue to apply an armor reduction debuff.
Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead will no longer be able to summon boss-type enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Directional damage indicators have been removed for Abilities, weapons or effects that do self-inflicted damage (Focus abilities, Nekros' Despoil, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.changes: Kills earned by Nekros' summoned Shadows of the Dead allies will now contribute to future casts of the ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Nekros

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Vauban, Mirage, Nekros, and Limbo are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Terrify having no effect on enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Nekros’ Desecrate showing as being castable even when players don’t have enough energy.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros appearing as blurry in his Codex diorama.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.3
patchlogs.changes: The Removal Of Arcane Enhancements On Nekros’ Mortos Syandana And Valkyr’S Bonds Is Now Live, And Any Attached Arcanes Have Been Returned To Your Inventory. As Stated In Hotfix 16.5.2, This Change Is Due To Nekros And Valkyr Having An Unfair Advantage Over Other Warframes By Having One Additional Arcane Slot.:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.changes: The Nekros Mortos Syandana and Valkyr Bonds can no longer be Enhanced. This change is due to Nekros and Valkyr having an unfair advantage over other Warframes by having one additional Arcane slot. We're going to be removing Arcanes off these two attachments, and running a script to compensate players so the Enhancements can be used on intended Syandanas. We will notify everyone when this script has started.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arrow skins and Nekros & Valkyr’s unique attachments not using the player’s custom colors.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Soul Survivor Augment not properly tracking revives or counting towards revive challenges as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/443040-nekros-soul-survivor-does-not-count-as-a-revive/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed kills from Chroma’s Effigy, Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead and the Itzal Archwing’s Fighter Escort not counting towards player stats.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nullifier Crewmen not nullifying Chroma’s Effigy or Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead summons.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.2
patchlogs.fixes: Nova and Nekros Noggles have been added to the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the timing on Nekros’ Terrify casting animation visual effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Added casting trails on Nekros’ abilities.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inappropriate sound replication occurring when Nekros` Soul Punch hits an enemy.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Soul Punch can be cast from any direction/orientation, meaning that Nekros doesn't have to orient himself to cast on a selected target.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead Ability not deactivating properly.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error caused by Nekros’ Desecrate.
Fixed Infested Boiler’s spawned enemies improperly attacking players while under the effect of Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead.
Fixed Nullifier Crewman not properly deploying shield when resurrected by Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.6.3 + 15.6.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a typo in Nekros’ Despoil Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead ability when spawning Kubrows.  Kubrows spawned now have the correct visual effects and will die once Shadows of the Dead has expired.
Fixed energy efficiency Mods not applying to Nekros’ Desecrate and Valkyr’s Rip Line.

patchlogs.name: Mesa Update
patchlogs.changes: Removed the health and shield penalties from Nekros’ Soul Punch Augment Mod

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nekros' Soul Punch not working correctly in PvP matches.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Nekros' Desecrate now affects frozen corpses.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Revisited Nekros tinting.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Crawlers spawned by Nekros’s Shadows of the Dead not being ‘auto-killed’ and rendering Exterminate and Defense missions uncompletable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’s Shadows of the Dead clones attacking players after host migration occurs.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a number of abilities having a cool down discrepancy between host and client. This includes Banshee’s Sonar, Nekros’s Terrify, and Ember’s Fireblast.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed an issue with Nekros' Shadow of the Dead ability providing extra points for Resurrected Warden.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a visual issue related to the Nekros' Summons from Shadows of the Dead.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.changes: Improved the performance of Nekros' Shadows of the Dead ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: 4x Immortal Skins: Nekros, Valkyr, Oberon, and Ember!

patchlogs.name: Update 12.1.0: Grinlok
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a situation where it was possible for a Nekros-Summoned-Ally to squad up with enemy ai and take points in Interception.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros’s Shadows of the Dead clones not attacking unless attacked first.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nekros Soul Punch ability to ragdoll target NPCs

patchlogs.name: Update 10.8.0
patchlogs.additions: Nekros Shroud and Nova Quantum helmets are here, and they are statless!

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a “power in use” bug that occurred after using Nekros’ Desecrate.
Fixed Nekros “noble” pose with Lanka equipped.
Fixed issue where MOAs raised with Nekros Shadows of the Dead ability knocked down friendly players.
Fixed issue where enemy Shield Osprey drones would shield friendly enemies controlled by Nyx or Nekros.
